overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a neon-lit indoor market bazaar with various food stalls and vending machines, transitioning to a brighter bar area with large windows overlooking the city.

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit market arcade observing various stalls and pedestrians

shirtless man with tattoos walking past the camera

entered.detail: large cylindrical billboard with rotating advertisements hanging from the ceiling
food vendor stall with bright blue neon signage
blue metal kiosk structure with barred windows and illuminated interior

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, neon-lit indoor market arcade. A large circular advertisement structure hangs prominently in the center while various NPCs walk through the space. The camera moves forward through the crowd, passing by food stalls and kiosks with cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: market corridor with steam vents and cyberware stalls

events.description: steam or smoke becomes visible rising from floor grates creating atmospheric haze
ambient light increases slightly as the camera approaches a brighter area ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing through the market passing a distinctive purple vending machine and approaching a cyberware food stall

notable_agents.action: vendor working behind the cyberware food stall counter

entered.detail: tall purple vending machine with yellow warning symbol and illuminated product display
food stall with glowing cyan CYBERWARE signage and menu displays

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the market corridor, the camera passes a prominent purple vending machine and approaches a cyberware food stall. Steam rises from floor grates creating atmospheric haze, and the lighting gradually brightens as the space opens up ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area between dark market and bright windowed bar section

events.description: exits the dark enclosed market into a brighter area with large panoramic windows
natural light from windows becomes dominant over artificial neon lighting

agents.ego_description: moving through the transition zone toward the bright bar area with large windows overlooking the city

entered.detail: red and black vending machine with bright illuminated display screen
floor-to-ceiling windows showing bright exterior city view with natural daylight

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions from the dark neon-lit market to a brighter, more open area with large windows. A red vending machine stands out on the right as natural daylight begins to compete with the artificial neon lighting, signaling the approach to the bar lounge area.

scene_state.functional_zone: bright bar lounge area with green stools and panoramic windows

events.description: enters the main bar area with long counter and green seating
slows down approaching the bar counter where a vendor stands

agents.ego_description: exploring the bar area and approaching the counter where a vendor stands ready to interact

notable_agents.action: barista vendor standing behind the counter leaning forward attentively

entered.detail: long bar counter with green stools and various items scattered on the surface
red neon OPEN sign hanging above the bar area

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a spacious bar lounge flooded with natural light from panoramic windows. The long bar counter with distinctive green stools dominates the space. A vendor stands behind the counter as the camera slows down, approaching for interaction.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar counter interaction area with dialogue interface visible

events.description: dialogue options appear on screen indicating interaction initiation with the barista

agents.ego_description: approaching the bar counter to interact with the vendor, dialogue choices visible on screen

notable_agents.action: barista waiting behind counter for player interaction with hands on the counter

entered.detail: open seating area with red chairs and tables visible beyond the bar counter

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the bar counter where dialogue options appear, indicating an interaction sequence. The barista waits attentively while the background reveals an open lounge seating area with red chairs and expansive windows showing the bright city exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, neon-lit market arcade that gradually opens into a brighter, more expansive corridor. It begins by pushing through a crowd of NPCs beneath a large, circular advertisement structure, passing various cyberpunk food stalls and kiosks. As the camera moves deeper into the market, it glides past a prominent purple vending machine and approaches a cyberware food stall. The scene then shifts as steam rises from floor grates to create an atmospheric haze, while the lighting steadily brightens as the space expands ahead.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, neon-lit market into a bright, sun-drenched bar lounge. It begins by leaving the dark bazaar, passing a prominent red vending machine as natural daylight starts to overpower the artificial neon glow. As the camera moves forward, the space opens into a spacious lounge flooded with light from panoramic windows, centering on a long bar counter lined with distinctive green stools. The scene then shifts toward a close-up interaction as the camera slows down to approach a waiting barista. Finally, the view settles at the counter where dialogue options appear, revealing a background of red lounge chairs and an expansive view of the bright city exterior.
